samples.gvd:
module fsm (
    input IN,
    input CLK,
    input RST,
    output reg MATCH
);
    
    parameter S0 = 3'b000, S1 = 3'b001, S2 = 3'b010, S3 = 3'b011, S4 = 3'b100, S5 = 3'b101, S6 = 3'b110, S7 = 3'b111;

    reg [2:0] current_state, next_state;

    always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
        if (RST) begin
            current_state <= S0;
            MATCH <= 1'b0;
        end
        else begin
            current_state <= next_state;
        end
    end
    
    always @(*) begin
        case (current_state)
            S0: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state = S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state = S0;
                end
            end
            S1: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state = S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state = S2;
                end
            end
            S2: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state = S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state = S3;
                end
            end
            S3: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state = S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state = S4;
                end
            end
            S4: begin
                if (IN) begin
                    next_state = S1;
                end
                else begin
                    next_state = S0;
                end
            end
            default: begin
                next_state = S0;
            end
    endcase

    end // Auto-repaired
    always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
        if (RST) begin
            MATCH <= 1'b0;
        end
        else begin
            if (current_state == S4 && IN) begin
                MATCH <= 1'b1;
            end
            else begin
                MATCH <= 1'b0;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Mealy FSM detection circuit that detects the sequence '10011' in the input signal IN. Outputs MATCH=1 when the sequence is detected, and MATCH=0 otherwise. Supports continuous input and loops through the sequence.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to be detected.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating whether the sequence '10011' has been detected.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        Always @(posedge CLK or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                MATCH <= 0;
            end else begin
                case ({IN, MATCH})
                    2'b10: MATCH <= 0;
                    2'b01: MATCH <= 0;
                    2'b00: MATCH <= 0;
                    2'b11: MATCH <= 1;
                endcase
            end
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
